description: Brokerage service contract v1 — 21 operations across portfolio, market data, orders, scanners, and system management. Designed for securities brokerages (stocks, options, futures, forex). Gateway-authenticated with triple order safety (env gate + confirm gate + order preview).

operations.description: Session status, auth state, write gate, rate limits
operations.name: status

operations.description: Keep session alive (heartbeat)
operations.name: tickle

operations.description: List linked brokerage accounts
operations.name: accounts

operations.description: Open positions with P&L, market value, cost basis
operations.name: positions

operations.description: NAV, cash, unrealised P&L, buying power, margin
operations.name: portfolio_summary

operations.description: List live/recent orders with fill status
operations.name: orders

operations.description: Search for contracts by symbol or name
operations.name: contract_search

operations.description: Live market data snapshot: last, bid, ask, volume, change
operations.name: quote

operations.description: Cash balances by currency
operations.name: cash_balances

operations.description: Daily and unrealised P&L
operations.name: pnl

operations.description: Contract info: exchange, currency, multiplier, tick size
operations.name: contract_detail

operations.description: Historical OHLCV bars for charting and analysis
operations.name: historical

operations.description: Detailed status of a specific order including fills
operations.name: order_status

operations.description: Recent trade executions with price, time, exchange
operations.name: trades

operations.description: Available market scanner types and filters
operations.name: scanner_params

operations.description: Run a market scanner (top gainers, most active, etc.)
operations.name: scanner_run

operations.description: What-if preview: margin impact, commission, equity change
operations.name: order_preview

operations.description: Place order (real money). Requires write gate + confirm gate
operations.name: place_order

operations.description: Reply to gateway order confirmation prompts
operations.name: confirm_order

operations.description: Modify quantity, price, or time-in-force on existing order
operations.name: modify_order

operations.description: Cancel an open order
operations.name: cancel_order

title: brokerage-v1
